raw_consumer_statement: Dear CFPB, I am filing a complaint against my credit card issuer, Barclays, for wrongfully denying a billing dispute in the amount of {$170.00} related to a transaction with the merchant XXXX. Despite providing clear documentation, the credit card company closed the dispute in favor of the merchant without proper consideration. Details of the billing dispute : I purchased an item from a seller on XXXX that was described as authentic. Upon receipt, I discovered the item was counterfeit and misrepresented. I immediately contacted the seller to request a return and refund. Despite multiple attempts to resolve the issue, the merchant refused to provide a return shipping label and insisted I keep the counterfeit item while promising to send a replacement, which I did not agree to. I escalated the matter to my credit card company, filing a dispute under Case ID XXXX. I explained the item was counterfeit and the seller refused to cooperate. However, my credit card company closed the dispute without refunding my money, despite clear evidence of fraud and misrepresentation.
